name: High Traffic Congestion Alert
description: Alerts when traffic congestion severity reaches high or critical levels
epl_rule: SELECT zone, COUNT(*) as incident_count, AVG(average_speed_kmh) as avg_speed FROM TrafficEvent(type='congestion', severity in ('high', 'critical')).win:time(10 min) GROUP BY zone HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2

name: Multiple Accidents - Cascade Effect
description: Detects cascading accidents in same zone within short time window
epl_rule: SELECT * FROM PATTERN [e1=TrafficEvent(type='accident', severity='critical') -> e2=TrafficEvent(type='accident', zone=e1.zone)].win:time(15 min) WHERE e1.timestamp < e2.timestamp

name: Hazardous Weather + Traffic Incidents
description: Correlation between severe weather and traffic accidents
epl_rule: SELECT * FROM PATTERN [c=ClimateEvent(type='storm', severity='high') -> t=TrafficEvent(type='accident')] WHERE c.zone = t.zone

name: Poor Air Quality + Health Emergency Spike
description: Detects correlation between poor air quality and emergency calls
epl_rule: SELECT * FROM PATTERN [a=EnvironmentEvent(type='air_quality', severity in ('high', 'critical')) -> h=HealthEvent(type='emergency_call', call_type in ('respiratory', 'cardiac'))] WHERE a.zone = h.zone

name: Large Crowd Gathering Detection
description: Alerts when population density exceeds threshold in monitored areas
epl_rule: SELECT zone, location, SUM(estimated_population) as total_population FROM PopulationEvent(type in ('gathering', 'crowd_alert'), severity in ('high', 'critical')).win:time(5 min) GROUP BY zone, location HAVING SUM(estimated_population) > 5000

name: Emergency Services Overload
description: Detects potential emergency services overload from multiple incidents
epl_rule: SELECT zone, COUNT(*) as emergency_count FROM HealthEvent(type='emergency_call', severity in ('high', 'critical')).win:time(10 min) GROUP BY zone HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5

name: Critical Environmental Event
description: Alerts on critical pollution or environmental incidents
epl_rule: SELECT zone, type, severity FROM EnvironmentEvent(severity='critical' OR (type='air_quality' AND aqi > 400)).win:time(1 min)

name: Multi-Domain Crisis Detection
description: Complex pattern detecting simultaneous critical events across multiple domains
epl_rule: SELECT * FROM PATTERN [t=TrafficEvent(severity='critical') and c=ClimateEvent(severity='critical') and p=PopulationEvent(severity='critical')] WHERE t.zone = c.zone AND c.zone = p.zone
